title: ChunkMetadata
description: Per-chunk metadata schema for Vertex AI Search DataStore registration and Gemini extraction prompts.

doc_id.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the source PDF bytes (64 chars).

source_file.description: Original PDF filename (basename only, no path).

title.description: Inferred document or chapter title. Empty string if not determinable.

domain.description: Controlled-vocabulary specialty domain. Must be one of the listed enum values.

subdomain.description: Narrower topic within the domain. Free text; not filterable by default.

doc_type.description: Document classification. front_matter chunks are excluded from search.

chapter.description: Nearest detected chapter or section heading above this chunk.

page_end.description: Last page of this chunk (1-indexed). Equal to page_start for single-page chunks.

chunk_index.description: Sequential zero-based index of this chunk within its parent document.

keywords.description: Key terms extracted by Gemini. 3–10 terms recommended.

entities.description: Named clinical/scientific entities (drugs, conditions, genes, procedures).

evidence_level.description: GRADE evidence level if the chunk contains a clinical recommendation. Null if not applicable.

year_published.description: Publication year extracted from title page or copyright notice. Null if not found.

notes.vertex_ai_search: All top-level string and integer fields (except keywords and entities arrays) are registered as filterable attributes in the DataStore schema. Array fields are stored but not filterable. Schema changes require scripts/setup_vertex_search.py to run UpdateSchema followed by a full re-import.
notes.controlled_vocab: The domain enum must be agreed upon by a domain expert before any ingestion run. Adding new enum values is a schema change — see issues.md P3.
